mission: Turn technically strong Wave 3 capabilities into canonical, product-credible, visual, loop-connected truth on the live Nexus site.

productTruthRules.visualCapabilityRule: Any capability that claims to produce a visual outcome must terminate in a real visual product surface inside Nexus on 127.0.0.1:4011, not at metadata, schema, regions, preview payloads, bullets, summaries, validation output, or internal renderer state.
surfaceQualityGates: makes the user understand what Nexus built

canonicalTaskList.taskName: Unify canonical artifact truth across downstream loop surfaces
acceptanceCriteria: One canonical artifact identity survives Proof, Artifact, Confirmation, State Update, Next Task, and Timeline.
Downstream screens stop reconstructing conflicting artifact stories from overlapping runtime fragments.
Confirmation visibly centers the same artifact the user reviewed in Proof.
productTruthValidationCriteria: The same artifact identity is visible across the downstream handoff chain.
No downstream screen downgrades artifact truth into summary-only truth.
verification4011Requirements: Run a live project to Proof on http://127.0.0.1:4011/.
Open the artifact route.
Continue to Confirmation, State Update, Next Task, and Timeline.
Verify the same artifact story survives visibly.

canonicalTaskList.taskName: Deliver a credible visual artifact path for internal-tool projects
acceptanceCriteria: Internal-tool projects no longer terminate in region or CTA metadata.
Proof and Artifact show a believable product surface for internal-tool outputs.
The result looks like something a real user could review or show.
productTruthValidationCriteria: The internal-tool artifact is visible, routeable, renderable, and actionable.
The output does not feel like generated-surface diagnostics.
verification4011Requirements: Create an internal-tool project on the live site.
Run it to Proof.

canonicalTaskList.taskName: Close landing and marketing onboarding truth gaps

productTruthValidationCriteria: Expectation truth is preserved from onboarding through continuation.

Complete onboarding.

canonicalTaskList.taskName: Eliminate fallback leakage from the live loop path
acceptanceCriteria: Live loop surfaces no longer present fallback, demo, or QA truth as if it were canonical product truth.

productTruthValidationCriteria: Visible truth on 4011 is clearly canonical.
QA and fallback logic is either removed from the main path or clearly separated.

Verify no misleading QA or fallback wording leaks into the main product path.

canonicalTaskList.taskName: Upgrade actionability of proof and artifact review surfaces
acceptanceCriteria: Critical review surfaces are not passive-only.

productTruthValidationCriteria: Users can do something meaningful with the surfaced artifact.
The surface advances the loop rather than merely describing it.

canonicalTaskList.taskName: Harden downstream review surfaces against metadata and debug feel
acceptanceCriteria: Confirmation, State Update, Next Task, and Timeline feel like product continuation rather than status consoles.

productTruthValidationCriteria: The touched surfaces remain product-credible.
